Race-Triton — Male Triton Fighter: 5
Strength: 12 (+1) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 14 (+2) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Charlatan Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: Greek-Demeter (NG)
Experience: 7055/14000 Level: 5 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 180/360
Ability Notes:
Triton Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Strength
Amphibious: Can breathe water
Swimmer: Has a 30' swim Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: General Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighting Style): 1; Fighter (Maneuver): 3; Fighter (Martial Archetype): 1
Feats: Alert Triton Features: Amphibious; Control Air And Water; Emissary Of The Sea; Guardians Of The Depths; Language (Common; Primordial); Swimmer; Triton Ability Adjustment Fighter Features: Action Surge; Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Battle Master; Combat Superiority; Distracting Strike; Extra Attack; Fighting Style (Archery); Fighting Style; Lunging Attack; Martial Archetype; Precision Attack; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival); Student Of War; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Charlatan Features: False Identity; Skill Proficiency (Deception; Sleight Of Hand); Tool Proficiency (Disguise Kit; Forgery Kit)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Martial Archetype: 1 selection
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +1 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +1 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +2
Athletics: (str) +4 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +5 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +4 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Deception; Perception; Sleight Of Hand
Tool Proficiency: Alchemist's Supplies; Disguise Kit; Forgery Kit
Languages: Common; Primordial
Skill Notes:
Student Of War: Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Emissary Of The Sea: Can speak to water-breathing creatures
False Identity: Has a documented second identity and can forge familiar documents
Combat
Hit Points: 16 Initiative: +6 Armor Class: 16
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Half Plate Shield: None Weapons: Halberd (+4 1d10+1 S); Handaxe (+4 1d6+1 S R20/60); Unarmed Strike (+4 1+1 B); War Pick (+4 1d8+1 P)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +5 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +10
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Fighting Style (Archery): +2 attacks with Ranged weapons
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Action Surge: Can take an extra action once per short rest
Alert: Cannot be surprised, and unseen foes gain no advantage on attacks on self
Combat Superiority: Can use a d8 superiority die to perform one of 3 chosen maneuvers 4 times per short rest
Distracting Strike: Can add a superiority die to damage and give advantage to the next ally attack against the same foe before the start of the next turn
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Lunging Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and gain +5' melee range
Precision Attack: Can add a superiority die to an attack
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+5 hit points once per short rest
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +5; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +2; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes: Guardians Of The Depths: Has resistance to cold damage and is unaffected by water depth
Magic
Attack: Triton: +5 Spell DC: Triton: 13
Spells:
Fog Cloud (Triton1 [Control Air And Water] Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Gust Of Wind (Triton2 [Control Air And Water] Evoc): (Action) 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn to redirect the wind
Wall Of Water (Triton3 [Control Air And Water] Evoc): (Action) R60' 30'x10'x1' wall or 20'x20'x1' ring creates difficult terrain, inflicts disadvantage on ranged attacks, reduces fire effects by half, and turns to ice from cold effects for concentration up to 10 min
Magic Notes: Control Air And Water: Can cast Fog Cloud Gust Of Wind, and Wall Of Water without expending a spell slot once per long rest
